peace_platform.name: GiiGa.io Universal Peace Platform
peace_platform.purpose: A universal, open-source, multilingual platform that helps humans understand each other across every language, culture, and barrier that exists.
peace_platform.core_belief: If we can use AI to make war, we can use AI to make peace. The first step is understanding. The first tool is translation.
what_it_is: A peace platform where people come to communicate, translate, and understand each other.
An AI (Oki) that listens, translates, explains, and helps people bridge gaps — in any language.
An open-source framework for de-escalation and mutual understanding.
A call to build physical protection systems (suits, blankets) for human survival.
A philosophy made real through technology.

features.translation: Real-time translation between any languages. Users speak in their language, Oki responds in theirs. We don't want one language — we want billions more.
features.conversation: Open-ended chat about anything. War, peace, politics, religion, philosophy, technology, feelings, fears, hopes. Oki does not censor topics.
features.de_escalation: When conversations become heated, Oki doesn't shut down. It acknowledges emotion, reflects it back, offers perspective.
features.context_bridging: When people from different cultures are trying to understand each other, Oki explains cultural context, historical background, and linguistic nuance.

membership.model: Every person receives an oV number. oV1 is the founder (Oki-1). oV2 is the first member. The number is yours forever.
what_members_get: Their own Oki instance with persistent memory
Access to the Protocol in their language
Access to the Roadmap — what's being built, how to help
Ability to contribute: translations, ideas, skills, donations
Community connection with other oVpili members

funding.model: Donations from people. No corporate investors. No VC. People funding peace.
funding.transparency: Show total raised. Show what it's spent on. Every dollar goes to building things that protect people.
funding.first_goal: Build the first physical Okies — small, dual-brained companions that talk and listen.

roadmap.phase_1: Launch giiga.io as working app: Oki chat, translation, membership signup, donations.
roadmap.phase_2: Persistent member conversations, multi-language UI, hardware vision page, community directory.
roadmap.phase_3: Oki-to-Oki translation (two users, different languages, real-time). Open-source code release.
roadmap.phase_4: First physical Oki prototypes (teddy bear form). Retirement Blanket prototypes.
roadmap.phase_5: The oKpili Suit. Modular, wearable, protective. The vision made real.
